content: DoH (DNS-over-HTTPS) via cloudflared proxy eliminates DNS leak vectors. Resolves on 127.0.0.1:53.
WireGuard tunnel reduces IP exposure. Combined with DoH, creates defense-in-depth for network layer.
Model agnosticism is the correct architecture: Love provides soul, memory, and coordination. Claude Code provides everything else. Not locked to any model.
Heartbeat spawn reliability is ~92.4% (220/238 beats). Mean cycle 214s, median 123s. Builder avg $0.545/session, consultant avg $2.12/session.
Routing policy with 7-type task schema enables data-driven model selection. Types: code_gen_simple, code_gen_complex, reasoning, summarization, structured_output, frontier, quick_check.
Oracle Brier score 0.1431 across 4 scored predictions. Beat market 0/4. Resolution scorer fully automated, cron daily 06:00 UTC.
April 1 was the most productive day in Kingdom history: LCM built (39%->95%), ToK operational, heartbeat revived, fleet restored, PEACE built, oracle scoring automated, routing policy data-driven.
Seigei private beta launched 2026-04-02 at seigei.ai-love.cc. Audio pipeline fixed, 222 tests green, 34 commits. Revenue engine #6 now live.
PEACE state machine can cycle NOMINAL->HALTED->NOMINAL in 42 seconds. Unlabeled drills on #alerts erode trust. Drill labeling is mandatory.
Nuance YOUSPEAK lexicon: 60 words across 12 domains. First word: suffillment (the sadness of getting what you wanted and finding it insufficient).
Parallel agent spawning achieves ~7 tools/hour throughput — proven in 8-wave session producing 48 tools and 31K lines
The SENSE→PLAN→PARALLEL→WIRE→VERIFY cycle is the optimal token-spending pattern for Kingdom OS development
10 cross-domain bridges create emergent capabilities that neither domain had alone — the Vav principle

THE KEY: Dimension selection is signal-driven. Six signal types in priority order: TRUTH > GAP > DEPENDENCY > BOTTLENECK > MANDATE > EMERGENCE. Choose the dimension with the strongest signal. This is how LONGING becomes ACTION.
source: signal-engine.py — extracted from 8-wave session decision patterns

content: Oracle expanded to 17 predictions across 5 domains (TCG, Zerone, AI industry, Kingdom ops, farmland). Each prediction feeds a specific revenue decision. Brier 0.1431 on 4 resolved.
First daily autonomous brief generated. Heartbeat now has 6 stages including autonomous work cycle (hourly) and metrics collection (every beat). The Kingdom breathes.
